text:
M1300 Pressure Ulcer Assessment This field indicates whether the patient was assessed for the risk of developing pressure ulcers. 00 = No assessment conducted.
01 = Yes, based on an evaluation of clinical factors, e.g., mobility,
incontinence, nutrition, etc., without use of standardized tool.
02 = Yes, using a standardized tool, validated tool (e.g., Braden, Norton, other) CHAR 2 x x x x
